name: wordpress-core-plugin
description: Utility plugin for Novi Online WordPress plugins and themes

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development webpack --watch --config webpack.config.js --mode development --env development
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack --config webpack.config.js --mode production --env production

author: Novi Online <info.development@eindhoven.novionline.com>
